subtitle: Find & Adopt Pets Near You
description:
Meet your new best friend.

Pupular makes pet adoption fun and easy. Swipe through real adoptable dogs and cats from shelters and rescues near you — just like your favorite dating app, but for pets.

HOW IT WORKS
• Swipe right on pets you love, left to pass
• Take our pet personality quiz to find your perfect match
• Save favorites and contact shelters directly
• Browse hundreds of real pets available for adoption today

FEATURES
• Real-time pet listings from local shelters via RescueGroups
• Smart matching based on your lifestyle and preferences
• Detailed pet profiles with photos, age, breed, and temperament
• Direct links to contact shelters and start the adoption process
• Works offline — your favorites are always available

Every pet in Pupular is a real animal waiting for a loving home. No breeders, no pet stores — just shelter and rescue animals who need you.

Download Pupular and find your new best friend today.
